description:
Capture a cache-disabled network profile (HAR file) of a complex webpage using Firefox Developer Tools, and identify the specific asset that took the longest time to download.

Steps:
1. Open Firefox Developer Tools (F12) and navigate to the 'Network' tab.
2. Enable the 'Disable Cache' option in the Network tab.
3. Navigate to 'https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/James_Webb_Space_Telescope' and wait for the page and all assets to fully load.
4. Export the captured network requests as a HAR file and save it to '~/Documents/jwst_network.har'.
5. Analyze the network requests in DevTools (sorting by the 'Time' column is recommended) to find the single asset that took the longest total time to load.
6. Create a text file at '~/Documents/slowest_asset.txt' containing ONLY the exact full URL of that slowest asset (e.g., 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/...').
